scripts.docker:db: docker compose --env-file .env.development -f docker-compose.dev.yml up --build db pgadmin
scripts.docker:db:down: docker compose --env-file .env.development -f docker-compose.dev.yml down -v db && docker compose --env-file .env.development -f docker-compose.dev.yml down pgadmin
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -p "[{name}]" -n "SHARED,FRONT,BACK" -c "magenta,cyan,green" "npm run dev:shared" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && concurrently "npm run build:frontend" "npm run build:backend"
